div.head: The Secretary of State to the Ambassador in Argentina (Weddell)
div.p: 75. Your 93, October 5, 4 p.m., and Consulate General’s October 5, 6 [5] p.m.Latter not printed. In view of possible conflicts of interests between the American groups known to be actively interested in reaching an exchange agreement with Argentina, and between them and holders of Argentine bonds, the Department is confident that you will exercise care not to give the impression that this Government favors any particular group or is in any way involved in the negotiations of these private groups.
